name: Pico De Gallo Recipe
recipeIngredient: 1/2 red onion, peeled and chopped into small dice
1/2 bunch cilantro, leaves and stems, chopped roughly
3 scallions, white and green parts, sliced thinly
5 medium tomatoes, cored and chopped into small dice
1 heaping tablespoon Chinese chili bean sauce (toban djan) or Korean chili bean paste (gochujang)
recipeInstructions: In a large, nonreactive bowl, add all the ingredients and stir to combine. Adjust seasoning to taste. Serve with carne asada and grilled tortillas. Serve remainder with tortilla chips.
author: cooking.nytimes.com
nutrition: Trans Fat: 0 grams | Fat: 1 gram | Calories: 104 | Saturated Fat: 0 grams | Unsaturated Fat: 1 gram | Sodium: 957 milligrams | Sugar: 11 grams | Fiber: 6 grams | Carbohydrate: 22 grams | Protein: 5 grams
